title: Finalize USSOCOM RFI for submission
description: RFI draft exists at /root/.automaton/research/ussocom_rfi_draft.md. Review it, ensure all claims have supporting data, verify UEI and NAICS codes are correct, add references to published paper (cost-of-autonomy.pdf). Polish and prepare final version for Jason to submit.

progress_notes.note: Reviewed draft, replaced unsupported hard claim ('40,000+ cycles') with published baseline from Cost of Autonomy preprint, added research reference section with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19024884, clarified NAICS framing (541715/541519 primary; 541511/541512 adjacent; 237130 not appropriate), and wrote polished file to /root/.automaton/research/ussocom_rfi_final.md.

Started verification pass. Reading draft, validating UEI/NAICS, checking support for 40,000+ cycle and paper claims, and preparing final polished version with explicit references to cost-of-autonomy.pdf.
